error_reason: Wintermute Ventures is explicitly presented on the official Wintermute site as the strategic investment arm of Wintermute, and the same official property concurrently markets Wintermute's OTC desk, algorithmic trading engine, liquidity provision, DeFi operations, and Venture support. Under the harness's operating_company_disguised_as_investor mapping, inheriting otc_trading, algorithm_trading, market_making, execution_services, and defi is acceptable. No official evidence supports sub_fund=yes.

Official Jump and Jump Crypto sources support treating Jump Crypto as an operating-company-style venture arm with trading, market participation, liquidity-provider context, and DeFi building activity. They do not clearly establish an OTC desk or client-facing execution-services offering for Jump Crypto itself, and the parent references to order execution and Jump Execution, LLC are not enough to inherit otc_trading=yes or execution_services=yes into this investor row. No manual review is required.
